display.purpose: Page titles and hero headings. Max one per view.

label.purpose: Badges, meta text, timestamps, small UI labels.

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: Default state for cards, panels, and containers.

shadows.name: ambient-hover
shadows.purpose: Optional, extremely subtle lift on interactive cards when hovered.

shadows.name: warm-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary elevation language. Focused inputs, active nav items, hovered primary buttons.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus. Warm halo, not a harsh outline.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions. 150ms duration.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Quick settle for dismissals and exits.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main call-to-action. Neutral at rest, warm on hover via glow and background shift.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #272522; color: #f0eeeb; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #bfa06e; color: #161514; box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(191, 160, 110, 0.10), 0 0 4px rgba(191, 160, 110, 0.06); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(191, 160, 110, 0.15); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Subdued actions. Transparent with subtle border; warm tint on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #f0eeeb; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #34322f; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(191, 160, 110, 0.06); border-color: rgba(191, 160, 110, 0.20); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(191, 160, 110, 0.15); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Flat container with tonal background and subtle border. No shadow at rest.
components.html:
Project Notes

Team notes and shared documents in one place.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #1f1d1b; color: #f0eeeb; border: 1px solid #34322f; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; margin: 0 0 8px 0; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; color: #96938e; margin: 0; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text field with warm glow focus ring. No harsh outline.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Enter a task title…" />
components.css: .ds-input { background: #1f1d1b; color: #f0eeeb; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; border: 1px solid #34322f; border-radius: 10px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #96938e; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(191, 160, 110, 0.40); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(191, 160, 110, 0.15); }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item. Active state uses faint warm tint and a micro-indicator.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: #96938e; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 6px; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); position: relative; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(191, 160, 110, 0.04); color: #f0eeeb; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: rgba(191, 160, 110, 0.08); color: #f0eeeb; } .ds-nav-item--active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 2px; height: 16px; background: #bfa06e; border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0; } .ds-nav-item svg { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Chip / Tag
components.description: Small label for categories, filters, or statuses. No borders.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #f0eeeb; background: #34322f; border-radius: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

narrative.overview: Tessera is a tool people run on their own servers. The interface should feel like walking into a well-kept workshop: everything has a place, nothing shouts for attention, and the warmth comes from use, not decoration. The visual system is built on a near-monochrome foundation. Warmth exists only as a whisper: a muted amber-orange that appears almost exclusively as ambient glow and micro-indicators.
keyCharacteristics: Neutral-first: every surface begins as greyscale; warmth must be invited
Flat by default: depth comes from tonal separation, not drop shadows
Glow as language: the accent color speaks through box-shadow, not background-fill
Calm density: comfortable spacing, generous whitespace, no visual shouting
Earned familiarity: components behave predictably, consistently, and quietly

rules.name: The Whisper Rule
rules.body: The accent color may occupy no more than 5% of any viewport at rest. Its presence must be ambient — a glow, a faint tint, a tiny indicator — never a dominant solid.

rules.name: The Neutral Floor Rule
rules.body: Every surface starts neutral. Warmth must be invited by state (hover, focus, active) or by a deliberate design choice, never inherited from the base palette. No warm-tinted body backgrounds in either mode.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce a second font family. The tool should disappear into the task, and type contrast draws attention that belongs to the content.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, focus, active). Do not pair a border with a soft wide shadow on the same element — pick one.

dos: Do use the accent exclusively as glow, micro-indicators, and faint tints. Solid fills are the exception, not the rule.
Do keep both dark and light mode visually consistent in proportion — the accent whisper should be equally quiet in both.
Do use tonal separation (bg → surface → elevated) to create hierarchy before reaching for shadows.
Do maintain 4.5:1 minimum contrast for all body text and placeholders.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion. Transitions become instant; glow becomes solid state change.
donts: Don't use the accent as a large solid fill (buttons, hero backgrounds, card headers). The Whisper Rule prohibits this.
Don't pair a 1px border with a soft wide shadow (blur ≥ 16px) on the same element. Pick one.
Don't use border-radius larger than 16px on cards or sections. Full-pill is reserved for tags and filter chips.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Decorative, never meaningful. Use weight or size for emphasis.
Don't use side-stripe borders (thick colored border-left on cards, callouts, or alerts). Rewrite with background tints or leading icons.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default. Blurs and glass cards are rare and purposeful, or nothing.
Don't add tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding.
Don't create a cyberpunk or neon aesthetic. No high-saturation blues, purples, or glow effects.
Don't ship a near-white warm-tinted background that reads as cream, sand, or parchment in light mode.
Don't use display fonts in UI labels, buttons, or data. Inter carries everything.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, top, left). Use transform and opacity only.
